response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with an impressive full-stack and systems background, but he does not match this role's core requirements. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database experience is MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and his financial exposure (RIDE Capital, Stripe) is fintech and payments, not fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking. The gap on both mandatory technical skills and required domain expertise is too wide for this consulting engagement.
strengths: Extensive senior engineering experience at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify) with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work handling millions of requests per second using asynchronous I/O and high-performance databases
Excellent communication skills evidenced by conference talks, multi-day courses, and workshop facilitation
concerns: Only about seven months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is limited to MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain expertise
Strong general engineering and performance-systems fundamentals
